critical_task: authenticate and select correct site/case context
foreseeable_use_error: uses shared account or wrong case
hazard_or_harm: result attributed to wrong person or unauthorized disclosure
risk_controls: named MFA account site scope canonical actor and LIS-side case check

foreseeable_use_error: uploads unsupported stain tissue scanner resolution or corrupted artifact
hazard_or_harm: plausible but wrong segmentation and quantitative result
risk_controls: input envelope gate quality checks clear rejection and IFU
transactional UI input/result hashes request ID release/model provenance side-by-side source

foreseeable_use_error: assumes all nuclei are found and correctly separated
hazard_or_harm: biased count or morphology with clinical influence
risk_controls: source overlay review failure gallery limitations and validated performance
validation_scenario: dense fused fragmented missed and edge cases

critical_task: interpret foreground score and TTA disagreement
foreseeable_use_error: treats values as malignancy probability or calibrated confidence
risk_controls: non-probability wording training tooltip and comprehension check

foreseeable_use_error: accepts output despite obvious artifact or cannot reject
risk_controls: visible reject action reason capture no forced acceptance and standard-method fallback

critical_task: respond to model audit readiness or provenance failure
foreseeable_use_error: retries or continues outside controlled system
hazard_or_harm: untraceable or unvalidated result influences care
risk_controls: fail closed actionable message downtime SOP and support escalation

foreseeable_use_error: exports without identity/version provenance or sends to unauthorized destination
risk_controls: bundled PDF/JSON provenance role-limited export site destination policy

foreseeable_use_error: deploys wrong image model config secret or writable mount
hazard_or_harm: unvalidated behavior unauthorized use or audit loss
risk_controls: signed immutable manifest IQ checks digest settings permissions and network

foreseeable_use_error: restores mismatched model/audit/config or loses chain
risk_controls: versioned encrypted backup compatibility validation chain verification signed rollback

critical_task: report suspected malfunction or harmful output
foreseeable_use_error: records as ordinary IT ticket and misses vigilance clock
risk_controls: trained complaint intake always-visible contact awareness timestamp and escalation

foreseeable_use_error: delays urgent workflow or uses screenshots/stale results
risk_controls: site downtime method status communication no cached result presentation and recovery reconciliation
